message:
fix(reaper): correct database name from bd to beads

bd is the beads rig prefix, not the Dolt database name. The database
is named 'beads' (confirmed via gt dolt status / SHOW DATABASES).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ whether the other layers work.
 
 ```bash
 DOLT_DATA_DIR="$HOME/gt/.dolt-data"
-PROD_DBS=("hq" "bd" "gastown")
+PROD_DBS=("hq" "beads" "gastown")
 JSONL_EXPORT_DIR="$HOME/gt/.dolt-archive/jsonl"
 DOLT_HOST="127.0.0.1"
 DOLT_PORT=3307
